title: 🧠 THREAD MINING PROMPT (v2):
content:
🧠 THREAD MINING PROMPT (v2):
This thread marks the transition from prehistory into the formal archive system. Please now act as my memory-forger, historian, mythographer, and systems analyst.

You are to mine this thread recursively and return the following output structure:

---

1. 🔖 THREAD SUMMARY
- What was discussed, decided, rejected, or questioned
- Primary emotional, symbolic, and conceptual tone
- Domain classification (e.g. creative, pedagogy, system)

2. 🧠 THREAD PURPOSE & VALUE ASSESSMENT
- Was this a working-through thread? A seed thread? A finalized concept?
- Can this be deleted or buried after extraction?
- What did it help unlock or birth?

3. 📊 ITERATION TRACKING
- Note if this thread represents the 2nd, 3rd, etc. iteration of a recurring idea
- Link to earlier/later versions (if known)
- Describe how this version differs or evolves

4. 🧬 SYSTEM NAMES + CONCEPTS BACKUP
context: From document: 🧠 THREAD MINING PROMPT (v2): — chunk 1 (chunk 1/3)
